RT by @reu3en10: 🔥 U2U DePIN Node Giveaway

We're teaming up with @uniultra_xyz to #giveaway 5 DePIN Subnet Nodes! By running a node, you help secure the network and earn rewards from U2U Network and multiple DePIN dApps.

🎁 Prizes: 5️⃣ DePIN Nodes free for 5️⃣ lucky winners + Secret Code for 5% discount on node purchase (valid on Oct 22nd, 2024).

⏰ Duration: 3 days.

📌 How to enter:

- Follow @DePINApp and @uniultra_xy and turn on notifications.
- Like & Retweet this post.
- Tag 3 friends to share this chance.
- Find Secret Code on U2U tweet and drop it in the comments with #U2UNetwork #DePIN

Don’t miss this chance! 🎉

#DePINAlliance #DePINApp #NodeSale
